title: wedelia kotschyi var. alba
intro: Wedelia kotschyi var. alba, also known as White Wedelia or White Mexican Daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family and is native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia kotschyi var. alba include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical applications, such as creams and ointments, or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
